mapper.sql: id, user_id, measure_date, steps, resting_heart_rate, sleep_hours, systolic, diastolic, stress_level, source_id, source_type, source_name, sync_task_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM health_metric WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY measure_date DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_metric ( user_id, measure_date, steps, resting_heart_rate, sleep_hours, systolic, diastolic, stress_level, source_id, source_type, source_name, sync_task_id ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{measureDate}, #{steps}, #{restingHeartRate}, #{sleepHours}, #{systolic}, #{diastolic}, #{stressLevel}, #{sourceId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceName}, #{syncTaskId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE health_metric SET steps = #{steps}, resting_heart_rate = #{restingHeartRate}, sleep_hours = #{sleepHours}, systolic = #{systolic}, diastolic = #{diastolic}, stress_level = #{stressLevel}, source_id = #{sourceId}, source_type = #{sourceType}, source_name = #{sourceName}, sync_task_id = #{syncTaskId} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND measure_date = #{measureDate}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM health_metric WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_id IS NOT NULL
